content.en:
"The Infinity Lord is so strong now?"

The Lord of the Wind Fangs, they were shocked.

"I'm surprised, too, but that's how the Infinity Lord is right now. "The Lord of Ice and Rain.

"If that's the case, then the Lord of Infinity is indeed qualified to serve as the owner of a sub-island. The Lord of Wind Tooth said: "However, after all, the Endless Lord is not qualified, and he has not joined Wind Tooth Island for a long time, so I am afraid that there are many Island Masters and even members of the Origin Middle Realm who are not convinced. "

"If they are not convinced, they can challenge the Lord of Endless, this is also the rule of Wind Tooth Island all along!" said the Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Okay, that's it, let's spread the news first. "

The Lord of the Windfangs.

Soon.

All the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the entire Wind Tooth Island knew that Ye Tian was about to become a branch island master, and all the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors were immediately stunned.

And the genius on the other side of Fengya Island who came to Fengya Island with Ye Tian was even more dumbfounded.

Among these other shore level geniuses, there are still a few who have not yet broken through to become the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and they are still thinking about cultivating the golden body of the other side to ten percent of the body, even if it is not a complete golden body of the other side, it doesn't matter.

Because of this, they have never chosen to break through.

As a result, they were still in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm, but Ye Tian was already about to become a sub-island master, and his status and strength were far above them, which was simply a blow to stimulate them!

Of course.

They were just jealous, but some of the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors were annoyed.

Before, the veteran Lord of Qingyun became the owner of the sub-island, and he was questioned and unconvinced by some Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and in the end, the Lord of Qingyun still defeated other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and then became the owner of Ice Rain Island.

In short, without showing strength, others are not convinced.

After all, the treatment of the island master position is far superior to that of other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and they naturally want to become the island master as well!

Soon.

Some of the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, including some Island Lords, had come to find the Lord of the Wind Fang, and they had recounted unfair and unconvincing words.

Among them, the one who took the lead was the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Middle Realm, the Lord of the Purple Sun!

The Lord of the Purple Sun had competed with the Lord of Qingyun for the position of the Lord of Frost Rain Island before, but he was defeated.

In this regard, he was very convinced, after all, the Lord of Qingyun belonged to the old Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor on Fengya Island, but he was very low-key, there was no problem with his qualifications, and after his strength was exposed, he also showed his strong strength, and everyone else was not an opponent, so he surrendered.

But.

What is Ye Tian, how long has he only joined Fengya Island?

Some Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors had only heard of this name, and they had never seen Ye Tian at all, and they thought that Ye Tian was a newcomer!

Seeing that these Origin Realms were not convinced, the Lord of the Wind Teeth said, "If you are not convinced, you can challenge the Lord of Endless. "

"Lord of Wind Tooth Island, I want to challenge the Lord of Endless!"

The Lord of the Purple Sun immediately said.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Windfangs agreed.

Soon, Ye Tian came here and met these Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors and a few Wind Island Island Masters.

Among them, the Lord of Baidu and the Lord of Qingyun were naturally also present, but they were just watching the excitement and did not participate.

"Lord of Endless, you want to apply to become the owner of the island, a few of us agreed, but they don't agree, you need to defeat them. The Lord of the Wind Teeth said.

"Lord of Wind Tooth Island, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he and the Lord of the Purple Sun stood above the void, and the Lord of the Wind Tooth opened the magic circle so as not to spread to the rest of the Wind Tooth Island.

Rumble!!!!

The Lord of the Purple Sun showed the aura of the top Origin Middle Realm, and the Origin on the other side definitely reached the level of more than 900,000.

Moreover, he has also cultivated a complete golden body on the other side, and his strength is very strong.

"The supreme art of the other side - the light of the eternal sun!"

The brilliant light turned into a silk thread and slashed towards Ye Tian.

This supreme technique on the other side seems to be able to cut through everything, and the attack power is naturally very powerful.

Then.

Ye Tian performed the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore - the Technique of Not Breaking the Golden Cover, and forcibly blocked the Light of the Supreme Technique of the Eternal Yang of the Lord of the Purple Sun.

Followed by.

Ye Tian unleashed the supreme magic light on the other side, and instantly approached the Lord of the Purple Sun.

The next moment.

He performed the top Beyond Shore Supreme Technique, the Beyond Slashing Technique, and directly slashed at the Lord of the Purple Sun.

The Lord of the Purple Sun also cultivated the defensive supreme technique of the other side, but it was not the top supreme technique of the other side, and he was directly broken by the other side of the slashing technique.

Burst!

The light of the Slashing Technique directly pierced the body of the Lord of the Purple Sun, causing him to suffer heavy damage.

"Are you still fighting?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Complete the golden body on the other side, at least eighty out of nine of the origin rules of the other side, as well as the top supreme technique on the other side, and the cultivation has also reached the peak of the origin middle realm!"

In just a short moment of fighting, the Lord of the Purple Sun saw these things.

The other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors who watched also saw it, and they were all dumbfounded.

Ye Tiancai has joined Fengya Island for such a short time, and he has made such terrifying progress.

"It is rumored that the Lord of Endless often uses the Eternal Ruin Divine Array, this is why it has progressed so fast!" the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Middle Realm guessed.

But the Eternal Ruins Divine Array can't let Ye Tian master the top-notch Beyond Supreme Technique, Ye Tian can create the top-notch Beyond Shore Supreme Technique, this is terrifying!

"I throw in the towel!"

The Lord of the Purple Sun lowered his head, feeling very embarrassed.

This time is even more embarrassing than last time, last time he failed to challenge the Lord of Qingyun, but he only lost at best, but this time he was crushed by the Lord of Endless, and it was a big shame!

Seeing that the Lord of the Purple Sun was defeated in seconds, the other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors gave up the challenge one by one.

With Ye Tian's current strength, even some sub-island owners are not opponents, so they are naturally qualified to serve as the owners of a certain sub-island!

......

"The strength of the Endless Lord has surpassed me!"

The Lord of Qingyun secretly sighed.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian asked him again and again, but in such a short time, he had to look up to Ye Tian.

And the Lord of the White Capital was also extremely surprised, Ye Tian's growth speed was too terrifying.

At the beginning, he personally brought Ye Tian over, and he also witnessed Ye Tian's growth.

A junior has become a strong man in their batch in a short period of time, and it has changed too much!

"Is there still an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor who wants to challenge the Lord of Endless?"

The Lord of the Wind Fangs asked.

One Origin Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor stopped talking, and all of them shut up, not daring to challenge.

Seeing this, the Lord of Wind Tooth said, "Then from now on, the Lord of Endless will be a new island master of Wind Tooth Island!"

"I've seen the Endless Island Master!"

A Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Middle Realm said politely.

In this way, Ye Tian became a sub-island owner of Fengya Island.
